# react-ts-forms Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-11-12

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.6+ with experimentalDecorators enabled + React 18+, TypeScript compiler API or Vite/webpack plugin for build-time type introspection, react-jsonschema-form (reference for validation patterns) (001-type-driven-form)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.6+ with experimentalDecorators enabled: Follow standard conventions

- 001-type-driven-form: Added TypeScript 5.6+ with experimentalDecorators enabled + React 18+, TypeScript compiler API or Vite/webpack plugin for build-time type introspection, react-jsonschema-form (reference for validation patterns)
